CVE-2019-25076.title: The TSS (Tuple Space Search) algorithm in Open vSwitch 2.x throug ...
CVE-2019-25076.description: The TSS (Tuple Space Search) algorithm in Open vSwitch 2.x through 2.17.2 and 3.0.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (delays of legitimate traffic) via crafted packet data that requires excessive evaluation time within the packet classification algorithm for the MegaFlow cache, aka a Tuple Space Explosion (TSE) attack.

CVE-2021-3905.title: A memory leak was found in Open vSwitch (OVS) during userspace IP ...
CVE-2021-3905.description: A memory leak was found in Open vSwitch (OVS) during userspace IP fragmentation processing. An attacker could use this flaw to potentially exhaust available memory by keeping sending packet fragments.

CVE-2022-32166.title: In ovs versions v0.90.0 through v2.5.0 are vulnerable to heap buf ...
CVE-2022-32166.description: In ovs versions v0.90.0 through v2.5.0 are vulnerable to heap buffer over-read in flow.c. An unsafe comparison of “minimasks” function could lead access to an unmapped region of memory. This vulnerability is capable of crashing the software, memory modification, and possible remote execution.

CVE-2022-4337.title: An out-of-bounds read in Organization Specific TLV was found in v ...
CVE-2022-4337.description: An out-of-bounds read in Organization Specific TLV was found in various versions of OpenvSwitch.

CVE-2022-4338.title: An integer underflow in Organization Specific TLV was found in va ...
CVE-2022-4338.description: An integer underflow in Organization Specific TLV was found in various versions of OpenvSwitch.

CVE-2023-1668.title: A flaw was found in openvswitch (OVS). When processing an IP pack ...
CVE-2023-1668.description: A flaw was found in openvswitch (OVS). When processing an IP packet with protocol 0, OVS will install the datapath flow without the action modifying the IP header. This issue results (for both kernel and userspace datapath) in installing a datapath flow matching all IP protocols (nw_proto is wildcarded) for this flow, but with an incorrect action, possibly causing incorrect handling of other IP packets with a != 0 IP protocol that matches this dp flow.

CVE-2023-3966.title: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch where multiple versions are vuln ...
CVE-2023-3966.description: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch where multiple versions are vulnerable to crafted Geneve packets, which may result in a denial of service and invalid memory accesses. Triggering this issue requires that hardware offloading via the netlink path is enabled.

CVE-2023-5366.title: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch that allows ICMPv6 Neighbor Adve ...
CVE-2023-5366.description: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch that allows ICMPv6 Neighbor Advertisement packets between virtual machines to bypass OpenFlow rules. This issue may allow a local attacker to create specially crafted packets with a modified or spoofed target IP address field that can redirect ICMPv6 traffic to arbitrary IP addresses.
